assertions: Agent uses the merge-pdf.ts script for merging
Agent specifies output path for merged PDF (--output)
Agent uses page-ranges flag for selective merging (--page-ranges)
Agent specifies correct page ranges: 1-5 for ch1, all for ch2, 3-10 for ch3
Agent uses the split-pdf.ts script for splitting
Agent uses chunks mode for splitting (--mode chunks)
Agent sets chunk size to 5 pages (--chunk-size 5)
Agent specifies output directory for split files (--output-dir)
